about.title: The author behind Seogard
about.role: Vue.js Lead Dev · founder of Seogard
about.intro: I build Vue.js interfaces full-time, and I build Seogard on the side — a guardian that catches SEO and GEO regressions before Google does. Not an SEO consultant, not a marketer: a developer who watched too many sites quietly break their own rankings on every deploy.
about.why1: One Friday evening, a team ships a redesign. In the browser, everything works. But on the server, SSR broke on hundreds of pages — the metas were gone. Google indexes empty pages, and nobody notices. Three weeks later, organic traffic has dropped.
about.why2: No tool on the market watches this continuously, because none compares the raw HTML Google indexes with the JavaScript render you see. I built the one that does.
about.rules: The rule guides on this site, I write one by one: each describes a real regression, how it plays out for Google and for language models, and how to fix it. No ranking promises, no made-up percentages — just the mechanics, honestly.
about.ctaText: Seogard compares the raw HTML and the JavaScript render of your pages and tells you what Google actually sees. Free, no account.
about.seoDescription: Aadil Talbi, Vue.js Lead Dev and founder of Seogard. Why and how I monitor SEO and GEO regressions by comparing raw HTML with the JavaScript render.
